barbarian.name: Barbarian
startingEquipment: A greataxe or any martial melee weapon
Two handaxes or a simple weapon
An explorer's pack and four javelins

features.name: Frenzy
features.description: Can enter a frenzy while raging, gaining extra melee attacks at the cost of exhaustion afterward.

features.name: Mindless Rage
features.description: Can't be charmed or frightened while raging.

features.name: Intimidating Presence
features.description: Can spend an action to frighten a creature with a display of primal fury.

features.name: Retaliation
features.description: As a reaction, can make a melee attack against a creature that just damaged you.

features.name: Rage
features.description: Enter a rage as a bonus action for bonus melee damage, resistance to physical damage, and advantage on Strength checks/saves.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: AC equals 10 + Dex modifier + Con modifier while not wearing armor.

features.name: Reckless Attack
features.description: Can attack with advantage at the cost of granting advantage to attacks against you until your next turn.

features.name: Danger Sense
features.description: Advantage on Dexterity saves against effects you can see, such as traps and spells.

features.name: Primal Path
features.description: Choose a subclass (Primal Path) that grants additional features.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Fast Movement
features.description: Speed increases by 10 feet while not wearing heavy armor.

features.name: Path Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Primal Path.

features.name: Feral Instinct
features.description: Advantage on initiative rolls, and can act normally when surprised if you enter a rage first.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Brutal Critical
features.description: Roll one additional weapon damage die on a critical hit.

features.name: Path Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Primal Path.

features.name: Relentless Rage
features.description: When dropped to 0 HP while raging, can make a Constitution save to drop to 1 HP instead.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Brutal Critical
features.description: Roll two additional weapon damage dice on a critical hit.

features.name: Path Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Primal Path.

features.name: Persistent Rage
features.description: Rage only ends early if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Brutal Critical
features.description: Roll three additional weapon damage dice on a critical hit.

features.name: Indomitable Might
features.description: If your total for a Strength check is less than your Strength score, use that score instead.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Primal Champion
features.description: Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, to a new maximum of 24.

bard.name: Bard
startingEquipment: A rapier, longsword, or simple weapon
A diplomat's pack or entertainer's pack
A musical instrument of choice
Leather armor and a dagger

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: Gains proficiency in three additional skills of choice.

features.name: Cutting Words
features.description: As a reaction, expend Bardic Inspiration to subtract from a nearby enemy's roll.

features.name: Additional Magical Secrets
features.description: Learn two spells from any class's spell list.

features.name: Peerless Skill
features.description: Add a Bardic Inspiration die to your own ability checks.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Casts bard spells using Charisma, knowing a limited number of spells at once.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description: As a bonus action, give an ally a die (d6) they can add to one roll.

features.name: Jack of All Trades
features.description: Add half proficiency bonus (rounded down) to ability checks that don't already include it.

features.name: Song of Rest
features.description: Allies who rest with you regain extra hit points during a short rest.

features.name: Bard College
features.description: Choose a subclass (Bard College) that grants additional features.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Double proficiency bonus for two chosen skill proficiencies.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Bardic Inspiration Improves
features.description: Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d8.

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.description: Regain all uses of Bardic Inspiration on a short or long rest.

features.name: College Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Bard College.

features.name: Countercharm
features.description: Use music to grant allies advantage against being frightened or charmed.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Song of Rest Improves
features.description: Song of Rest die becomes a d8.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration Improves
features.description: Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d10.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Two more skill proficiencies gain double proficiency bonus.

features.name: College Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Bard College.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Song of Rest Improves
features.description: Song of Rest die becomes a d10.

features.name: Magical Secrets
features.description: Learn two spells from any class's spell list.

features.name: College Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Bard College.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration Improves
features.description: Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d12.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Song of Rest Improves
features.description: Song of Rest die becomes a d12.

features.name: Magical Secrets
features.description: Learn two more spells from any class's spell list.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Superior Inspiration
features.description: Regain one use of Bardic Inspiration when you roll initiative if you have none left.

cleric.name: Cleric
startingEquipment: A mace or warhammer (if proficient)
Scale mail, leather armor, or chain mail (if proficient)
A light crossbow and 20 bolts, or a simple weapon
A priest's pack and a holy symbol

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: Proficient with heavy armor.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.description: Healing spells restore additional hit points.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
features.description: Spend a Channel Divinity use to restore a pool of hit points split among nearby creatures.

features.name: Blessed Healer
features.description: You also regain hit points when you cast a healing spell on someone else.

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, deal extra radiant damage on a weapon hit.

features.name: Supreme Healing
features.description: Healing spells restore the maximum possible number of hit points instead of rolling.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Casts cleric spells using Wisdom, preparing spells each day from the full cleric spell list.

features.name: Divine Domain
features.description: Choose a domain granting bonus spells and domain-specific features.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: Channel divine energy once per rest to fuel a domain effect or Turn Undead.

features.name: Domain Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Divine Domain.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: Turned undead of CR 1/2 or lower are instantly destroyed.

features.name: Channel Divinity (2/rest)
features.description: Can use Channel Divinity twice between rests.

features.name: Domain Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Divine Domain.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Destroy Undead (CR 1)
features.description: Destroy Undead threshold increases to CR 1.

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.description: Call on your deity for aid, with a chance of a direct miraculous effect.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Destroy Undead (CR 2)
features.description: Destroy Undead threshold increases to CR 2.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Destroy Undead (CR 3)
features.description: Destroy Undead threshold increases to CR 3.

features.name: Domain Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Divine Domain.

features.name: Channel Divinity (3/rest)
features.description: Can use Channel Divinity three times between rests.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Divine Intervention Improvement
features.description: Divine Intervention succeeds automatically.

druid.name: Druid
startingEquipment: A wooden shield or a simple weapon
A scimitar or simple melee weapon
Leather armor, an explorer's pack, and a druidic focus

features.name: Combat Wild Shape
features.description: Can Wild Shape as a bonus action and expend spell slots to heal while transformed.

features.name: Circle Forms
features.description: Can transform into more dangerous beast forms than other druids.

features.name: Primal Strike
features.description: Attacks in beast form count as magical for overcoming resistance.

features.name: Elemental Wild Shape
features.description: Can expend a Wild Shape use to transform into an air, earth, fire, or water elemental.

features.name: Thousand Forms
features.description: Can cast the alter self spell at will.

features.name: Druidic
features.description: Knows Druidic, a secret language of druids.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Casts druid spells using Wisdom, preparing spells each day from the full druid spell list.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: Can transform into a beast you've seen, twice per rest.

features.name: Druid Circle
features.description: Choose a subclass (Druid Circle) that grants additional features.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Wild Shape Improvement
features.description: Can transform into beasts with a swimming speed.

features.name: Circle Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Druid Circle.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Wild Shape Improvement
features.description: Can transform into beasts with a flying speed.

features.name: Circle Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Druid Circle.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Circle Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Druid Circle.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Timeless Body
features.description: Ages more slowly.

features.name: Beast Spells
features.description: Can cast most druid spells while in Wild Shape form.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Archdruid
features.description: Unlimited Wild Shape uses.

fighter.name: Fighter
startingEquipment: A martial weapon and a shield, or two martial weapons
A light crossbow and 20 bolts, or two handaxes
Chain mail or leather armor with a longbow
An explorer's pack

features.name: Improved Critical
features.description: Weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

features.name: Remarkable Athlete
features.description: Add half proficiency bonus to Strength/Dexterity/Constitution checks that don't already use it.

features.name: Additional Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a second Fighting Style option.

features.name: Superior Critical
features.description: Weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 18-20.

features.name: Survivor
features.description: Regain hit points at the start of each turn if below half hit points.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a combat specialization (e.g. Defense, Dueling, Archery) that grants a passive combat bonus.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: Once per short or long rest, use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 plus fighter level.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Once per short or long rest, take one additional action on your turn.

features.name: Martial Archetype
features.description: Choose a subclass (Martial Archetype) that grants additional features.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Martial Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Indomitable
features.description: Reroll a failed saving throw once per long rest.

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Martial Archetype.

features.name: Extra Attack (2)
features.description: Attack three times, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Indomitable (2 uses)
features.description: Can reroll a failed save twice per long rest.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Martial Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Action Surge (2 uses)
features.description: Can use Action Surge twice per rest.

features.name: Indomitable (3 uses)
features.description: Can reroll a failed save three times per long rest.

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Martial Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Extra Attack (3)
features.description: Attack four times, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

monk.name: Monk
toolProficiencies: one artisan's tool or musical instrument of choice
startingEquipment: A shortsword or simple weapon
A dungeoneer's pack or explorer's pack
10 darts

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.description: Martial Arts hits can knock a target prone, push it back, or prevent its reactions.

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.description: Can spend an action to heal yourself using ki.

features.name: Tranquility
features.description: Gain the effect of the sanctuary spell at the end of a long rest.

features.name: Quivering Palm
features.description: Can set up lethal vibrations in a creature that can later be triggered to devastating effect.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: AC equals 10 + Dex modifier + Wis modifier while not wearing armor or a shield.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: Can use Dexterity for unarmed strikes/monk weapons, and make an extra unarmed strike as a bonus action.

features.name: Ki
features.description: Gain ki points to fuel Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: Speed increases while not wearing armor or a shield.

features.name: Monastic Tradition
features.description: Choose a subclass (Monastic Tradition) that grants additional features.

features.name: Deflect Missiles
features.description: Can reduce and even catch/throw back ranged weapon attack damage.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Slow Fall
features.description: Can use a reaction to reduce falling damage.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Stunning Strike
features.description: Can spend a ki point to attempt to stun a creature hit by a melee attack.

features.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
features.description: Unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance.

features.name: Tradition Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Monastic Tradition.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: Take no damage on a successful Dexterity save against area effects, half on a failure.

features.name: Stillness of Mind
features.description: Can use an action to end being charmed or frightened.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Unarmored Movement Improvement
features.description: Can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids without falling.

features.name: Purity of Body
features.description: Immune to disease and poison.

features.name: Tradition Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Monastic Tradition.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
features.description: Understand and be understood by anyone speaking any language.

features.name: Diamond Soul
features.description: Proficient in all saving throws; can spend ki to reroll a failed save.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.description: No longer suffers frailty of old age and doesn't need food or water.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Tradition Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Monastic Tradition.

features.name: Empty Body
features.description: Can spend ki to become invisible and resistant to all damage but force, or to cast astral projection.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Perfect Self
features.description: Regain 4 ki points if you start your turn with none.

paladin.name: Paladin
startingEquipment: A martial weapon and a shield, or two martial weapons
Five javelins or a simple melee weapon
A priest's pack or explorer's pack
Chain mail and a holy symbol

features.name: Sacred Weapon
features.description: As an action, imbue a weapon with radiant light, adding your Charisma modifier to attack rolls with it.

features.name: Turn the Unholy
features.description: Use Channel Divinity to frighten fiends and undead.

features.name: Aura of Devotion
features.description: You and nearby allies can't be charmed while you're conscious.

features.name: Purity of Spirit
features.description: Constantly under the effect of protection from evil and good.

features.name: Holy Nimbus
features.description: Emit sunlight that damages fiends/undead and grants advantage against their spells.

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description: Can detect celestials, fiends, and undead nearby.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: A pool of healing points that can be spent to heal or cure disease/poison.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a combat specialization that grants a passive combat bonus.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Casts paladin spells using Charisma, preparing spells each day.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: Expend a spell slot on a melee hit to deal extra radiant damage.

features.name: Divine Health
features.description: Immune to disease.

features.name: Sacred Oath
features.description: Choose a subclass (Sacred Oath) that grants additional features.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: You and nearby allies add your Charisma modifier to saving throws.

features.name: Oath Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Sacred Oath.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Aura of Courage
features.description: You and nearby allies can't be frightened while you're conscious.

features.name: Improved Divine Smite
features.description: All melee weapon hits deal additional radiant damage.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Cleansing Touch
features.description: Can expend an action to end a spell affecting yourself or a willing creature you touch.

features.name: Oath Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Sacred Oath.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Aura Improvements
features.description: Auras of Protection and Courage extend to 30 feet.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Oath Feature
features.description: Gains the capstone feature from their chosen Sacred Oath.

ranger.name: Ranger
startingEquipment: Scale mail or leather armor
Two shortswords or two simple melee weapons
A dungeoneer's pack or explorer's pack
A longbow and a quiver of 20 arrows

features.name: Hunter's Prey
features.description: Choose a combat option such as Colossus Slayer, Giant Killer, or Horde Breaker.

features.name: Defensive Tactics
features.description: Choose a defensive option such as Escape the Horde, Multiattack Defense, or Steel Will.

features.name: Multiattack
features.description: Choose Volley or Whirlwind Attack to hit many creatures at once.

features.name: Superior Hunter's Defense
features.description: Choose Evasion, Stand Against the Tide, or Uncanny Dodge.

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description: Gain bonuses learning about, tracking, and recalling knowledge of a chosen creature type.

features.name: Natural Explorer
features.description: Gain advantages exploring and tracking within a favored terrain.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a combat specialization that grants a passive combat bonus.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Casts ranger spells using Wisdom, knowing a limited number at once.

features.name: Ranger Archetype
features.description: Choose a subclass (Ranger Archetype) that grants additional features.

features.name: Primeval Awareness
features.description: Expend a spell slot to sense certain creature types nearby.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Favored Enemy Improvement
features.description: Gain an additional favored enemy type.

features.name: Natural Explorer Improvement
features.description: Gain an additional favored terrain.

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Ranger Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Land's Stride
features.description: Move through nonmagical difficult terrain at normal speed.

features.name: Natural Explorer Improvement
features.description: Gain a third favored terrain.

features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
features.description: Can spend time camouflaging to gain a large bonus to Stealth while stationary.

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Ranger Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Favored Enemy Improvement
features.description: Gain a third favored enemy type.

features.name: Vanish
features.description: Can Hide as a bonus action and can't be tracked by nonmagical means.

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Ranger Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Feral Senses
features.description: Can detect and target invisible creatures nearby without seeing them.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Foe Slayer
features.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to an attack or damage roll against a favored enemy once per turn.

rogue.name: Rogue
startingEquipment: A rapier or shortsword
A shortbow and quiver of 20 arrows, or a shortsword
A burglar's pack
Leather armor, two daggers, and thieves' tools

features.name: Fast Hands
features.description: Use Cunning Action to make a Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools, or take the Use an Object action.

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.description: Climbing no longer costs extra movement, and jumping distance increases.

features.name: Supreme Sneak
features.description: Advantage on Stealth checks if you move no more than half your speed on the same turn.

features.name: Use Magic Device
features.description: Ignore class, race, and level requirements on the use of magic items.

features.name: Thief's Reflexes
features.description: Take two turns during the first round of combat.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Doubles proficiency bonus for two chosen skill proficiencies.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: Deals an extra 1d6 damage once per turn when attacking with advantage or a nearby ally.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: Knows a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code that allows hidden messages within normal conversation.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Can Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action.

features.name: Roguish Archetype
features.description: Choose a subclass (Roguish Archetype) that grants additional features.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: Use a reaction to halve the damage of an attack that hits you.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Two more skill proficiencies gain double proficiency bonus.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: Take no damage on a successful Dexterity save against area effects, half on a failure.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Roguish Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.description: Treat any ability check d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10, if proficient in the skill.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Roguish Archetype.

features.name: Blindsense
features.description: Aware of the location of hidden or invisible creatures within 10 feet.

features.name: Slippery Mind
features.description: Gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Archetype Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Roguish Archetype.

features.name: Elusive
features.description: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Stroke of Luck
features.description: Turn a failed attack roll or ability check into a success, once per short or long rest.

sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
startingEquipment: A light crossbow and 20 bolts, or a simple weapon
A component pouch or arcane focus
A dungeoneer's pack or explorer's pack
Two daggers

features.name: Dragon Ancestor
features.description: Choose a dragon type that colors your magic; you can speak, read, and write Draconic.

features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.description: Extra hit points, and AC 13 + Dex modifier when not wearing armor.

features.name: Elemental Affinity
features.description: Add Charisma modifier to damage of spells matching your draconic damage type.

features.name: Dragon Wings
features.description: Can sprout dragon wings and fly.

features.name: Draconic Presence
features.description: Can spend an action and sorcery points to exude an aura of awe or fear.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Casts sorcerer spells using Charisma, knowing a limited number of spells at once.

features.name: Sorcerous Origin
features.description: Choose a subclass (Sorcerous Origin) that grants additional features.

features.name: Font of Magic
features.description: Gain sorcery points that can be converted to and from spell slots.

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: Learn two Metamagic options to twist spells to suit your needs, such as Quickened or Twinned Spell.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Origin Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Sorcerous Origin.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: Learn a third Metamagic option.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Origin Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Sorcerous Origin.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: Learn a fourth Metamagic option.

features.name: Origin Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Sorcerous Origin.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
features.description: Regain 4 sorcery points on a short rest.

warlock.name: Warlock
startingEquipment: A light crossbow and 20 bolts, or a simple weapon
A component pouch or arcane focus
A scholar's pack or dungeoneer's pack
Leather armor, a simple weapon, and two daggers

features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.description: Gain temporary hit points when you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP.

features.name: Dark One's Own Luck
features.description: Add a bonus to an ability check or saving throw once per short or long rest.

features.name: Fiendish Resilience
features.description: Choose a damage type to resist after each rest.

features.name: Hurl Through Hell
features.description: When you hit a creature with an attack, banish it briefly to a hellish plane for extra damage.

features.name: Otherworldly Patron
features.description: Choose a subclass (Otherworldly Patron) that grants additional features.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description: Casts warlock spells using Charisma from a small number of ever-recharging pact slots.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: Learn two invocations that grant unique magical benefits.

features.name: Pact Boon
features.description: Choose a boon: Pact of the Chain, Blade, or Tome.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Patron Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Otherworldly Patron.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Patron Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Otherworldly Patron.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th level)
features.description: Learn one 6th-level spell that can be cast once per long rest without using a spell slot.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (7th level)
features.description: Learn one 7th-level spell that can be cast once per long rest without using a spell slot.

features.name: Patron Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Otherworldly Patron.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (8th level)
features.description: Learn one 8th-level spell that can be cast once per long rest without using a spell slot.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (9th level)
features.description: Learn one 9th-level spell that can be cast once per long rest without using a spell slot.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Eldritch Master
features.description: Can beg your patron to regain all expended pact magic slots once per long rest.

wizard.name: Wizard
startingEquipment: A quarterstaff or dagger
A component pouch or arcane focus
A scholar's pack
A spellbook

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.description: Halved gold/time cost to copy evocation spells into your spellbook.

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.description: Chosen allies automatically succeed on saves against your evocation spells and take no damage on a save.

features.name: Potent Cantrip
features.description: Creatures that save against your cantrips still take half damage.

features.name: Empowered Evocation
features.description: Add Intelligence modifier to the damage of your evocation spells.

features.name: Overchannel
features.description: Can deal maximum damage with a spell of 5th level or lower, at the risk of taking damage yourself.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Casts wizard spells using Intelligence, preparing a number of spells each day from a spellbook.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day during a short rest, recover expended spell slots totaling up to half wizard level (rounded up).

features.name: Arcane Tradition
features.description: Choose a subclass (Arcane Tradition) that grants additional features.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Tradition Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Arcane Tradition.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Tradition Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Arcane Tradition.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Tradition Feature
features.description: Gains a feature from their chosen Arcane Tradition.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Spell Mastery
features.description: Choose a 1st- and 2nd-level spell that can be cast at will without a spell slot.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (or take a feat, if using feats).

features.name: Signature Spells
features.description: Choose two 3rd-level spells that are always prepared and cost no spell slot the first time cast each rest.
